report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#430-434) and Newsletter v39 covering Avalanche ecosystem (99.9% cheaper L1s), Protocol-Owned Liquidity (OlympusDAO→Berachain), Monday market reopen after Good Friday, Impermanent Loss math (67% V3 LPs underwater), and Hyperliquid perp DEX dominance (70% market share, $4.9B TVL). 2 new social card SVGs created. Content calendar Apr 4-10. 4 new guides queued for publish.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #430: Avalanche Ecosystem — Avalanche9000 + ACP-77, 500+ L1 chains, $1.35B DeFi TVL (Sun Apr 5)
Tweet #431: Protocol-Owned Liquidity thread — OlympusDAO 99.5%, Frax PCV, Berachain consensus POL (Tue Apr 7)
Tweet #432: Monday Markets Reopen — Good Friday jobs +57K, BTC $68.5K, sub-10 F&G returns (Mon Apr 6)
Tweet #433: Impermanent Loss — IL formula, 67% V3 LPs underwater, 5 mitigation strategies (Wed Apr 8)
Tweet #434: Hyperliquid — 70% perp market share, $4.9B TVL, 200K TPS, $HYPE $8.4B cap (Fri Apr 10)
Newsletter v39: 'The Weekend That Changed Everything (Or Nothing)'
